name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: Researcher
entity_types.description: Academic or industry researcher involved in technology development, such as authors of the paper.

attributes.name: affiliation
attributes.description: Institution or company the researcher is associated with

entity_types.name: University
entity_types.description: Higher education institution involved in research or academic discussions.

entity_types.name: TechCompany
entity_types.description: Technology company developing or using WiFi, sensors, or related hardware.

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: Primary industry sector, e.g., networking, hardware

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organization or publication reporting on technology and research.

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: Type of media, e.g., newspaper, online platform

entity_types.name: GovernmentAgency
entity_types.description: Government body involved in regulation, funding, or privacy oversight.

entity_types.name: PrivacyAdvocate
entity_types.description: Individual or group advocating for privacy rights in technology contexts.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Name of the advocate or group representative

attributes.name: focus_area
attributes.description: Primary focus, e.g., surveillance, data protection

entity_types.name: HealthcareProvider
entity_types.description: Hospital, clinic, or healthcare organization using monitoring technologies.

entity_types.name: TechJournalist
entity_types.description: Journalist specializing in technology reporting and analysis.

attributes.name: publication
attributes.description: Media outlet the journalist works for

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual not fitting into more specific person types, e.g., general public, users.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: General role or context, e.g., consumer, concerned citizen

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization not fitting into more specific organization types, e.g., small business, communi...

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Brief description of the organization's purpose

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Entity is affiliated with an organization, e.g., researcher with university.

edge_types.name: PUBLISHES
edge_types.description: Entity publishes research, news, or reports.

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Entity regulates or oversees another entity's activities.

edge_types.name: USES_TECHNOLOGY
edge_types.description: Entity uses or implements the technology discussed.

edge_types.name: ADVOCATES_FOR
edge_types.description: Entity advocates for or against issues related to the technology.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Entity reports on news or developments related to the technology.

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Entities collaborate on research, projects, or initiatives.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Entity comments on or discusses the technology or related issues.

analysis_summary: 文本内容是一篇关于使用WiFi信号进行密集人体姿态估计的学术论文，涉及研究人员、大学、技术公司、隐私问题、医疗应用等。针对社交媒体舆论模拟，设计了10个实体类型，包括8个具体类型（如Researcher、University、TechCompany等）和2个兜底类型（Person、Organization），以及8个关系类型，以反映相关主体在技术发展、隐私讨论、媒体报道等方面的互动。
simulation_requirement: 请你分析一下现在这篇论文的发展
